content.en:
"The Forbidden Ancestral Spring is too precious, it was because there was no Forbidden Ancestral Spring that the Battle Gate would have fallen behind a lot in the Holy War, if I hadn't been born out of thin air, the Holy War Records of the Battle Gate would have been very rubbish!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In fact, more than once, many holy wars, the battle gate's record is not good, because of the lack of taboo ancestral springs, in terms of cultivating the holy son, the battle gate is relatively average.

However, the invincible domain ancestor level, the battle gate level is more awesome, and there are many treasures that can cultivate the invincible domain ancestor.

Of course, those treasure lands were useless to Ye Tian now, so he didn't go.

After all, his strength was even stronger than that of ordinary peerless domain ancestors, and those treasures naturally had no effect on him.

"The Forbidden Ancestral Spring was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, once the news is leaked, I am afraid that even the other Holy Gates will be moved, so as to snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

That's right, the Forbidden Ancestral Spring can be snatched away, and in fact it is also a treasure land.

The Superior Domain Ancestor could intercept a piece of Void and take the Forbidden Ancestral Spring away.

"Hide the news as much as possible, if it is really discovered, I want to see which of the Holy Gate's Peerless Domain Ancestors dares to make a move?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

With the birth of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, Ye Tian began to vigorously cultivate the geniuses of the human race.

The forbidden ancestral fountain was born, and many top-notch holy body inheritances were born.

Moreover, many Terran Domain Ancestors easily cultivated to the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm with the help of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring.

In just 100 million years, the number of the strongest domain ancestors of the human race has increased by a hundred times, what a terrifying improvement!

And Ye Tian has also made great progress, once again controlling 365 times his physical body, completing the second invincible domain body transformation, and his strength has skyrocketed again.

......

It is impossible for Terran cultivators to stay in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm all the time, and they often practice in the outside world, and some even go to the Dark Sacred Realm.

Some Terran cultivators fell in the outside world, were caught by other strong people, interrogated and revealed the information, and accidentally revealed the forbidden ancestral spring.

No matter how much Ye Tian preached the importance of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring to the human race, he must not divulge it, but not everyone can do it.

In the past, they said that the Xuanxu Saint Realm had a lot of resources, but it didn't attract much attention.

But the taboo ancestral spring is different, once it is leaked, it will inevitably be an uproar.

this day.

The matter of the Xuanxu Saint Realm's possession of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring was exposed, and as for who leaked it, Ye Tian couldn't find out.

The Ten Holy Gates soon found out about this and immediately sent someone to confirm it.

First of all, Zhanmen got the news the fastest, because Zhanmen could directly ask Ye Tian.

War Tower.

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, is it true that your Xuanxu Holy Realm gave birth to the Forbidden Ancestral Spring?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"It's true!"

Ye Tian admitted.

The news has been leaked, and it is useless to deny it, besides, it is the Fire Emblem War Ancestor of the Battle Gate who asks, so it is naturally not good for him not to answer.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you should be very aware of the value of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, it is not of much help to individuals, but it is too precious for a force. The other Holy Gates that did not have a Forbidden Ancestral Spring were afraid that they would rob the Forbidden Ancestral Spring of the Xuanxu Holy Realm. I suggest that you move the Forbidden Ancestral Spring to the Battle Ancestor Realm, so that the other Holy Gates will not come to snatch it. "

Fire Emblem War Ancestor proposed.

Ye Tian directly refused: "Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, this forbidden ancestral spring belongs to human beings, and it is impossible for me to put it in the War Ancestor Realm." As for the other Holy Gate's Superior Domain Ancestors, I'll stop it!"

Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor knew that he couldn't persuade Ye Tian, so he stopped persuading.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, you be careful, once you can't defeat it, the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate will go to support!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

After all, Ye Tian also belongs to the Battle Gate, and if Ye Tian is in trouble, it is naturally impossible for the Battle Gate to ignore it.

However, the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate is also very busy, and he needs to guard the Battle Ancestor Realm and cultivate, so it is impossible to sit in the Xuanxu Saint Realm all the time.

This was also the reason why the Fire Emblem War Ancestor suggested that Ye Tian put the Forbidden Ancestral Spring in the War Ancestor Realm.

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, I'll pay attention!"

Ye Tiandao.

......

Immortal Holy Gate, Immortal Ancestral Realm.

The Immortal Ancestral Realm happened to be one of the Ancestral Realms that did not give birth to a Forbidden Ancestral Spring, and now the news that the Xuanxu Saint Realm had given birth to a Forbidden Ancestral Spring came.

Subsequently, the Immortal Ancestral Realm sent someone to investigate, and soon the news came.

"The news is true!"

Upon hearing this news, the Immortal Holy Gate's Peerless Domain Ancestor was shocked.

In the core area of the Immortal Ancestral Realm, in an ancient Immortal Ancestral Palace.

A majestic figure emerged, and it was a peerless domain ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate.

Soon, thirteen Superior Domain Ancestors appeared.

The Immortal Holy Gate actually has more than these Superior Domain Ancestors, some of them are resisting the Silent Annihilation Clan, and the Peerless Domain Ancestors who have come here are all Peerless Domain Ancestors with true bodies, otherwise it would be useless to come here.

"Everyone, the Forbidden Ancestral Spring was born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, although the Lord of the Xuanxu Holy Realm is a member of the Battle Gate, but our Ten Holy Gates often clash, and it is nothing to rob them of their treasures. I suggest that we immediately snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, lest the Forbidden Ancestral Spring be moved to the War Ancestor Realm by the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, then we won't be able to snatch it! The War Ancestor Realm has an Ancestor Incarnation in charge, let's die as many as we want!"

The Superior Domain Ancestor, the Black Striped Saint Ancestor, spoke.

"We will definitely go, but who will be sent to snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring? If we all go out, we will definitely alarm the Battle Gate, and they will probably stop us, and even take the opportunity to trouble our Immortal Holy Gate. Therefore, it is recommended to send someone over and snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring as quickly as possible!" said another Superior Domain Ancestor.

Immediately, they discussed it for a long time, and finally decided to send the Black Striped Saint Ancestor over.

Although the Black Striped Saint Ancestor was only in the mid-stage realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, he had comprehended the Ancestral Technique, so his combat power was far from being comparable to that of the Peerless Domain Ancestor like the Jinchen Saint Ancestor.

If he went to snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, a mere Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor would not be able to defeat him at all, and there would be no way to stop him.

"Black Striped Holy Ancestor, hurry over as fast as possible, don't delay time, otherwise don't let other Holy Sects take the lead, and we will lose a lot!"

Many Peerless Domain Ancestors urged.

"Okay, I'll come when I go!"

The Dark Saint Ancestor said with a smile.

Immediately, he urged a secret treasure that instantly pierced through time and space and crossed the Dark Sanctuary.

Battle Gate.

One by one, the Peerless Domain Ancestors looked at the location of the Immortal Holy Gate.

"The Black Striped Saint Ancestor is gone!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

Just as he was about to go to support the Xuanxu Holy Realm, one by one the Immortal Holy Gate's Peerless Domain Ancestors crossed time and space and came to the Battle Ancestor Domain.

Once the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Battle Ancestor Realm wanted to leave, they would chat with the Superior Domain Ancestor of the War Ancestor Realm.

With a slight delay, the Black Vein Saint Ancestor would be able to complete the task.
